opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My shirt was suddenly soaked in blood an hour ago from my chest, and the skin there looks completely swollen and pitted like an orange.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The bleeding from the nipple came out of nowhere an hour ago and soaked my top, and the skin has puffed up and gone dimpled really fast — I'm frightened and don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: I first noticed a hard lump in my right breast about two months ago but I was too scared to do anything about it. In the last day or two the nipple started pulling inwards, and then about an hour ago it suddenly poured out blood.
symptom_narrative.duration: the lump about two months; the nipple pulling in over the last day or two; the sudden bleeding and skin swelling in the last hour
symptom_narrative.character: the lump feels hard and doesn't hurt; the nipple is pulled inward; the skin over the breast is swollen and dimpled like the skin of an orange; the discharge is bright blood
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the bleeding really scared me and I feel wiped out and shaky
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the lump has been there for weeks, but the bleeding and skin changes came on suddenly today
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing I've tried; holding a gauze pad against it slows the bleeding a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: touching or pressing the area seems to bring on more bleeding
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been feeling really drained and exhausted for no clear reason
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; I've never had bleeding from the nipple
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm just sitting still because I'm so shaken and upset by it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse, who is here and helped make this call; put off getting the lump checked out of fear

objective_data_offered.value: the skin over the right breast looks swollen and pitted/dimpled like orange peel, and the nipple looks pulled inward
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/partner description over video — not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: active bright-red bleeding oozing from the right nipple onto a gauze pad
spouse says she is very distressed and pale-looking, sitting still and holding blood-stained gauze to the chest
37.2 degrees on our home thermometer — no fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: I'm not taking any blood thinners and I'm not on any hormone tablets
